source.license: CC0-1.0 for the transfermarkt-datasets repository release; original values are Transfermarkt estimates.

method: For completed men World Cup tournaments from 2006-2022, filter the monthly global top 100 Transfermarkt player valuation snapshot to qualified countries, sum each country available top-100-player values, and show the top countries plus their top players. This is a top-player proxy, not an official 23/26-man squad market-value total.
